generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are quietly reducing their defense budgets while expecting us to shoulder more of the burden? It's time we prioritize our own strategic autonomy. Supporting a strong, independent defense isn't just about national security—it's about ensuring our allies take responsibility too. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurityFirst
